mapper.sql: id, dataName, dataType, dataId, field, alias, name, title, titleKey, cssId, cssClass, cssStyle, type, render, sort, orderable, searchable, visible, required, readonly, disabled, extData, extKey, extValue, media, clazzName, superData, status, compId, isSystemField, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into data_field_relation (dataName, dataType, dataId, field, alias, name, title, titleKey, cssId, cssClass, cssStyle, type, render, sort, orderable, searchable, visible, required, readonly, disabled, extData, extKey, extValue, media, clazzName, superData, status, compId, isSystemField, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime ) values (#{dataName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{field,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{alias,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{titleKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cssId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cssClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cssStyle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{render,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderable,jdbcType=BIT}, #{searchable,jdbcType=BIT}, #{visible,jdbcType=BIT}, #{required,jdbcType=BIT}, #{readonly,jdbcType=BIT}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{extData,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{media,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clazzName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{superData,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isSystemField,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

update data_field_relation
dataName = #{dataName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dataType = #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dataId = #{dataId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
field = #{field,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update data_field_relation set dataName = #{dataName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dataType = #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dataId = #{dataId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, field = #{field,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, alias = #{alias,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, titleKey = #{titleKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cssId = #{cssId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cssClass = #{cssClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cssStyle = #{cssStyle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, render = #{render,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, orderable = #{orderable,jdbcType=BIT}, searchable = #{searchable,jdbcType=BIT}, visible = #{visible,jdbcType=BIT}, required = #{required,jdbcType=BIT}, readonly = #{readonly,jdbcType=BIT}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, extData = #{extData,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, extKey = #{extKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, extValue = #{extValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, media = #{media,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, clazzName = #{clazzName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, superData = #{superData,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, compId = #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, isSystemField = #{isSystemField,jdbcType=BIT}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select * from data_field_relation
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dataName = #{model.dataName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dataType = #{model.dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dataId = #{model.dataId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
field = #{model.field, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
alias = #{model.alias, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
title = #{model.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
titleKey = #{model.titleKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cssId = #{model.cssId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cssClass = #{model.cssClass, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cssStyle = #{model.cssStyle, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{model.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
render = #{model.render, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
sort = #{model.sort, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
orderable = #{model.orderable, jdbcType=BIT} AND
searchable = #{model.searchable, jdbcType=BIT} AND
visible = #{model.visible, jdbcType=BIT} AND
required = #{model.required, jdbcType=BIT} AND
readonly = #{model.readonly, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
extData = #{model.extData, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
extKey = #{model.extKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
extValue = #{model.extValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
media = #{model.media, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
clazzName = #{model.clazzName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
superData = #{model.superData, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
status = #{model.status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compId = #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
isSystemField = #{model.isSystemField, jdbcType=BIT} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
find_in_set( dataName, (select group_concat(distinct dataName, ",", ifnull(superData, "")) from `data_field_relation` where dataName = #{model.dataNameWithSuper}) )
( dataName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dataType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or field like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or alias like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or title like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or titleKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cssId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cssClass like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cssStyle like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or type like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or render like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extData like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extValue like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or media like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or clazzName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from data_field_relation
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dataName = #{model.dataName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

find_in_set( dataName, (select group_concat(distinct dataName, ",", ifnull(superData, "")) from `data_field_relation` where dataName = #{model.dataNameWithSuper}) )
( dataName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dataType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or field like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or alias like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or title like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or titleKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cssId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cssClass like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cssStyle like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or type like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or render like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extData like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extKey like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extValue like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or media like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or clazzName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
